headline: Built for Developers.
subheadline: A native, lightweight desktop companion that integrates with your workflow seamlessly.

features.title: Local-First AI
features.description: Runs entirely on your machine via Ollama. No API keys, no cloud, no compromises.

features.title: Instant Response
features.description: Stream tokens in real-time. The pet speaks each word as it's generated, keeping latency at zero.

features.title: Zero Telemetry
features.description: No analytics, no crash reports, no tracking. Your conversations stay yours, forever.

features.title: Model Agnostic
features.description: Llama 3, Phi-3, Gemma, Qwen, Mistral, CodeLlama — use any model Ollama supports out of the box.

features.title: Desktop Native
features.description: Built with Tauri 2. Tiny binary, native performance, system tray integration, and low memory footprint.

features.title: Personality Modes
features.description: Curious, Focused, Playful, Sleepy — pick a personality that matches your current workflow and mood.
